title: Declare a test module async: true with DataCase
prompt: Write the opening of a test module `MyApp.SimpleTest` at `test/my_app/simple_test.exs` that declares `use MyApp.DataCase, async: true`, followed by a single stub test `test "two plus two" do assert 2 + 2 == 4 end`. The test must be async.
tier_rationale: Boilerplate. The discriminator is that Sonnet sometimes defaults to async: false out of caution.
